name: johnny
title: johnny
description:
GUI for John the Ripper
Johnny is provides a GUI for the John the Ripper
password cracking tool.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use johnny because GUI for John the Ripper.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use johnny as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `johnny [options] [args]` as documented upstream for johnny.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair johnny with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `johnny --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
